# Founder-Led Trust System

Founder-led content can make ads work better because it gives the buyer a person, mechanism, and worldview to inspect.

## Formats

- build-in-public demos,
- teardown threads,
- technical walkthroughs,
- opinionated category takes,
- customer problem breakdowns,
- honest limitation posts,
- before/after workflow videos,
- objection responses.

Founder-led content should show thinking, mechanism, proof, and conviction.
